---
name: Feature or idea suggestion
about: Suggest a new idea, doc, or improvement
title: '[Idea] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Short description of the new idea, feature, or improvement.

## Details
- What is the idea or change?
- Why would it be useful for this repo?
- Any references (e.g. similar services, articles)?

## Suggested structure (if it's a new doc)
- Where should it live? (e.g. `docs/`, `docs/recommendations/`)
- Suggested filename and main sections.

## Additional context
Anything else that would help (e.g. links, examples).
